entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress applied to sorghum lines in early, late, or combined stages

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The city in India where the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Mean diurnal temperature, which was uniformly high during the experiment

entities.name: EVAPORATION RATE
entities.description: The rate of evaporation, which was uniformly high during the experiment

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, affected by the timing and severity of stress

entities.name: BOOTING
entities.description: A growth stage of the sorghum plant

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: A growth stage of the sorghum plant

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The growth phase of the plant before reproductive stages

entities.name: NUMBER OF GRAINS
entities.description: The number of grains per square meter, strongly correlated with grain yield

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: The total dry mass of the plant, associated with variation in grain yield

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass, reduced when stress occurred at flowering

entities.name: THERMAL GROWTH RATE
entities.description: Growth measured in grams per square meter per degree Celsius day

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The maximum possible yield, determined by growth from booting to flowering

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The study of plant life cycle stages and their timing

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain productivity under drought stress
